name: claude-remotion-editor
description: Interactive hand-path editor for Remotion video compositions with Lottie animations

scripts.render:dorian:preview: remotion render src/index.ts DorianDemo out/dorian-demo-preview.mp4 --gl=angle --codec h264 --crf 28 --concurrency 8
scripts.render:dorian:hq: remotion render src/index.ts DorianDemo out/dorian-demo-hq.mp4 --gl=angle --codec h264 --crf 16
scripts.render:v4: remotion render src/index.ts MobileChatDemoV4 out/mobile-demo-v4.mp4 --gl=angle --codec h264 --crf 23
scripts.render:combined: remotion render src/index.ts MobileChatDemoCombined out/mobile-demo-combined.mp4 --gl=angle --codec h264 --crf 23
scripts.render:capabilities: remotion render CapabilitiesDemo out/capabilities-demo.mp4 --gl=angle --codec h264 --crf 23 && ./scripts/post-render-feedback.sh CapabilitiesDemo out/capabilities-demo.mp4
scripts.render:stores: remotion render src/index.ts DorianStores out/dorian-stores.mp4 --gl=angle --codec h264 --crf 23
scripts.render:full: remotion render src/index.ts DorianFull out/dorian-full.mp4 --gl=angle --codec h264 --crf 20
scripts.render:dorian-full:v1.10: remotion render src/index.ts DorianFullV1-10 out/dorian-full-v1.10.mp4 --gl=angle --codec h264 --crf 20 --concurrency 8
scripts.render:dorian-full:v1.10:2x: npm run render:dorian-full:v1.10 && node scripts/render-2x.js out/dorian-full-v1.10.mp4
scripts.render:dorian-full:v1.10:preview: remotion render src/index.ts DorianFullV1-10 out/dorian-full-v1.10-preview.mp4 --gl=angle --codec h264 --crf 28 --concurrency 8

scripts.render:dorian-full:v1.10:swiftshader:2x: npm run render:dorian-full:v1.10:swiftshader && node scripts/render-2x.js out/dorian-full-v1.10-swiftshader.mp4
